quote: I walked in carrying the week on my shoulders. Somewhere between the clay and the quiet, it softened.
name: Aisha K.

quote: It didn’t feel like a class. It felt like permission—to go slow, to make something imperfect, to belong.
name: Rahul V.

quote: The Pause Project is where Mumbai’s noise thins out. I keep coming back for the people and the hush.
name: Elina D’Souza
